title: Legends: Anime
description: The Anime pack for Legends Mod 1.18.2 &  1.20.1 Forge Minecraft.
body:
![Legends Anime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63bab3bda940fd8713558513272959bbd295abc5.png)

**_Ever wanted to build your own Aqua Heartia while flying around as Goku battling Naruto in Tailed Beast State in Minecraft?! Or traverse across Konoha as One Punch Man hunting down the Jaegerists? The Legends Anime Pack will feature Anime such as Naruto, Dragon Ball, One Piece, Bleach, Black Clover, Solo Leveling, and way more, allowing you to suit up as your favorite heroic Anime characters or become evil villains such as Madara to fight in the battle against good evil._**

![Goku Meteor Blast](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcW50bmdmdDA3c2JzZGVqNWFybG9obnA0bjhranRydmhjeXVvOWd3aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/19TQjHAvsCXLELWjPI/giphy.gif)
